---
Static
---
!1 Fitnesse test data
It creates a complete suite of test data. The goal is to generate all the test data necessary to run all the test without using "system" data.

 * Standard FitNesse text '''${fitnesseTextId}'''
 * >1 variable of each type
 * A group for new
 * A group for read or update
 * A standard presentation
 * A FitNesse record type '''${fitnesseRecordTypeId}'''
 * A FitNesse validation type '''${fitnesseValidationTypeId}'''
 * Role and Rules for fitnesse users

!***> Define common variables
!define currentAuthToken {$adminAuthToken}
!define expectedCreateResult {CREATED}
!define expectedAnswer {!--!}
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse text

!define recordType {text}
!define createData {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"coraText"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"children":[{"name":"text","value":"en text"}],"name":"textPart","attributes":{"type":"default","lang":"sv"}},{"children":[{"name":"text","value":"a text"}],"name":"textPart","attributes":{"type":"alternative","lang":"en"}}],"name":"text"}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse metadataTextVariable
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseMetadataTextVarId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"name":"validationType", "children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataTextVariable"}]}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"fitnesseTextVar"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"name":"regEx","value":".*"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"textVariable"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of another standard fitnesse metadataTextVariable
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseAnotherMetadataTextVarId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataTextVariable"}]}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"fitnesseAnotherTextVar"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"name":"regEx","value":".*"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"textVariable"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse metadataOnlyOneTextVariable
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"name":"metadata","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataTextVarId}!-"},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataTextVariable"}]}]},{"name":"nameInData","value":"fitnesseOnlyOneTextVar"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"regEx","value":".*"}],"attributes":{"type":"textVariable"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse metadataNumberVariable
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseMetadataNumberVarId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataNumberVariable"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"fitnesseNumberVar"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"name":"min","value":"0"},{"name":"max","value":"10"},{"name":"warningMin","value":"1"},{"name":"warningMax","value":"9"},{"name":"numberOfDecimals","value":"0"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"numberVariable"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse genericCollectionItem

!***> Creation of a standard ${fitnesseBlueTextId} text

!define recordType {text}
!define createData {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseBlueTextId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"coraText"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"children":[{"name":"text","value":"blå"}],"name":"textPart","attributes":{"type":"default","lang":"sv"}},{"children":[{"name":"text","value":"blue"}],"name":"textPart","attributes":{"type":"alternative","lang":"en"}}],"name":"text"}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseBlueItemId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"genericCollectionItem"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"blue"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseBlueTextId}!-"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseBlueTextId}!-"}],"name":"defTextId"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"collectionItem"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse metadataItemCollection
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseCollectionId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataItemCollection"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"colour"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"children":[{"repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseBlueItemId}!-"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"collectionItemReferences"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"itemCollection"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!style_red[metadataRecordLink point to a Demo recordType. Change to a fitnesse recordType]
!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse metadataRecordLink
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseLinkId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataRecordLink"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"demo"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"demo"}],"name":"linkedRecordType"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"recordLink"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Create recordLink to binary
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"name":"metadata","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseBinaryLinkId}!-"},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataRecordLink"}]}]},{"name":"nameInData","value":"fitnesseBinary"},{"name":"linkedRecordType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"binary"}]},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]}],"attributes":{"type":"recordLink"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse ${fitnesseRecordInfoGroupId}, definition for recordtype and update
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"name":"metadata","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseRecordInfoGroupId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"nameInData","value":"recordInfo"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"recordInfoText"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"recordInfoDefText"}]},{"name":"childReferences","children":[{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"1","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"idTextVar"}]},{"name":"childRefCollectTerm","repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"collectTerm"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"recordIdCollectIndexTerm"}],"attributes":{"type":"index"}}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"5","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"recordTypeLink"}]}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"3","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"createdByLink"}]}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"4","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"dataDividerLink"}]},{"name":"childRefCollectTerm","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"collectTerm"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"systemPermissionTerm"}],"attributes":{"type":"permission"}}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"6","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"X"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"permissionUnitLink"}]}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"8","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"tsCreatedTextVar"}]}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"10","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"X"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"updatedGroup"}]}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"111","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"validationTypeLink"}]}]}]}],"attributes":{"type":"group"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse collect term, ${fitnesseCollectIndexTermId}
!define recordType {collectTerm}
!define createData {!-{"name":"collectTerm","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseCollectIndexTermId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"collectIndexTerm"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"nameInData","value":"fitnesseCollectIndexTerm"},{"name":"extraData","children":[{"name":"indexFieldName","value":"fitnesseTextVar"},{"name":"indexType","value":"indexTypeString"}]}],"attributes":{"type":"index"}}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord

*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse metadataGroup, definition for recordtype and update
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {${FITNESSE_UPDATE_GROUP_ON_CREATE}}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse new metadataGroup, definition for recordInfo new
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"name":"metadata","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseRecordInfoNewGroupId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"nameInData","value":"recordInfo"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"recordInfoText"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"recordInfoDefText"}]},{"name":"childReferences","children":[{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"2","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"dataDividerLink"}]},{"name":"childRefCollectTerm","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"collectTerm"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"systemPermissionTerm"}],"attributes":{"type":"permission"}}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"111","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"validationTypeLink"}]}]}]}],"attributes":{"type":"group"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse new metadataGroup, definition for new
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseNewGroupId}!-"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"fitnesseExample"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"children":[{"repeatId":"4","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseRecordInfoNewGroupId}!-"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseMetadataTextVarId}!-"}],"name":"ref"},{"name":"childRefCollectTerm","repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"collectTerm"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseCollectIndexTermId}!-"}],"attributes":{"type":"index"}}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"7","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseAnotherMetadataTextVarId}!-"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"1","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"X"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseMetadataNumberVarId}!-"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"2","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseCollectionVarId}!-"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"3","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseLinkId}!-"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"5","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseBinaryLinkId}!-"}]}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"6","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseOnlyOneMetadataTextVarId}!-"}]}]}],"name":"childReferences"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"group"}}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Fitnesse Search Group
!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse search term, ${fitnesseSearchTermId}
!define recordType {searchTerm}
!define createData {!-{"name":"searchTerm","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchTermId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"searchTerm"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"searchTermType","value":"final"},{"name":"searchInRecordType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"text"}]},{"name":"indexTerm","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"collectTerm"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseCollectIndexTermId}!-"}]}]}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse search metadataTextVariable, ${fitnesseSearchTextVarId}
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"name":"metadata","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchTextVarId}!-"},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataTextVariable"}]}]},{"name":"nameInData","value":"fitnesseSearchTerm"},{"name":"regEx","value":".*"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]}],"attributes":{"type":"textVariable"}}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse metadata, ${fitnesseSearchIncludePartGroupId}
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"name":"metadata","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchIncludePartGroupId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"nameInData","value":"includePart"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"childReferences","children":[{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchTextVarId}!-"}]}]}]},{"name":"excludePGroupCreation","value":"true"}],"attributes":{"type":"group"}}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse metadata, ${fitnesseSearchIncludeGroupId}
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"name":"metadata","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchIncludeGroupId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"nameInData","value":"include"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"childReferences","children":[{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchIncludePartGroupId}!-"}]}]}]},{"name":"excludePGroupCreation","value":"true"}],"attributes":{"type":"group"}}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse metadata, ${fitnesseSearchGroupId}
!define recordType {metadata}
!define createData {!-{"name":"metadata","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchGroupId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"nameInData","value":"fitnesseSearch"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"childReferences","children":[{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchIncludeGroupId}!-"}]}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"1","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"searchStartNumberVar"}]}]},{"name":"childReference","repeatId":"2","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"name":"ref","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"searchRowsNumberVar"}]}]}]}],"attributes":{"type":"group"}}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse search, ${fitnesseSearchId}
OBS! Search is pointing to metadata, just in order to be able to create the search, since ${fitnesseRecordTypeId} does not exists yet. The search is updated after the recordType is created
!define recordType {search}
!define createData {!-{"name":"search","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"search"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"metadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"presentationId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchPGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"recordTypeToSearchIn","repeatId":"7","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadata"}]},{"name":"searchGroup","value":"publicSearch"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]}]}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse sequence
!define recordType {sequence}
!define createData {!-{"name":"sequence","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseSequenceId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"sequence"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"currentNumber","value":"0"}]}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse recordType
!define recordType {recordType}
!define createData {${FITNESSE_RECORD_TYPE_NEW}}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord

!***> Update ${fitnesseSearchId} to point ${fitnesseRecordTypeId}
!define recordType {search}
!define recordId {${fitnesseSearchId}}
!define expectedAnswer {}
!define expectedUpdateResult {OK}
!define updateData {!-{"name":"search","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"ignoreOverwriteProtection","value":"true"},{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchId}!-"},{"name":"type","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"search"}]},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"search"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"metadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"presentationId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseSearchPGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"recordTypeToSearchIn","repeatId":"7","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseRecordTypeId}!-"}]},{"name":"searchGroup","value":"publicSearch"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]}]}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.updateRecord
*!
*!

!***> Creation of a standard fitnesse validationType
!define recordType {validationType}
!define createData {!-{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseValidationTypeId}!-"},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"validationType"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]}]},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"newMetadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseNewGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"newPresentationFormId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnessePGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"metadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"presentationFormId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnessePGroupId}!-"}]},{"name":"validatesRecordType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseRecordTypeId}!-"}]}]}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of Roles And Rules for fitnesse users
!***> Creation of rule ${fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRuleId} (It should be able to read binary record instances with all possible visibilities)
!define ignoreOverwriteProtectionReadOnAllVisibilitiesRule {!--!}
!define permissionRulePartReadOnAllVisibilitiesRule {!-[{"name":"permissionRulePartValue","repeatId":"1","value":"system.binary"}]-!}
!define recordType {permissionRule}
!define fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRuleMetaData {!-{"name":"permissionRule","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[-!${ignoreOverwriteProtectionReadOnAllVisibilitiesRule}!-{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRuleId}!-"},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"permissionRule"}]}]},{"name":"permissionRulePart","children":[{"name":"permissionRulePartValue","repeatId":"0","value":"system.read"}],"attributes":{"type":"action"}},{"name":"permissionRulePart","children":-!${permissionRulePartReadOnAllVisibilitiesRule}!-,"attributes":{"type":"recordType"}},{"name":"activeStatus","value":"active"},{"name":"permissionTermRulePart","repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"rule","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"collectTerm"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"visibilityPermissionTerm"}]},{"name":"value","repeatId":"0","value":"system.*"}]},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]}]}-!}
!define createData {${fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRuleMetaData}}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!

!***> Creation of role ${fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRoleId}
!define recordType {permissionRole}
!define createData {!-{"name":"permissionRole","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"-!${fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRoleId}!-"},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]},{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"permissionRole"}]}]},{"name":"permissionRuleLink","repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"permissionRule"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseBinaryReadOnAllVisibilitiesRuleId}!-"}]},{"name":"activeStatus","value":"active"},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseTextId}!-"}]}]}-!}

!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord
*!
*!

!***> Creation of a fitnesse record to use as host record in binary records
!define recordType {${fitnesseRecordTypeId}}
!define createDataeeeee {!-{"name":"fitnesseExample","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseValidationTypeId}!-"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"cora"}]},{"name":"inTrashBin","value":"-!${fitnesseTrashBinValue}!-"},{"name":"visibility","value":"published"}]},{"name":"fitnesseTextVar","value":"someValue"}]}-!}
!define createData {!-{"name":"fitnesseExample","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"-!${fitnesseValidationTypeId}!-"}]},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"cora"}]}]},{"name":"fitnesseTextVar","value":"someValue"}]}-!}
!include -seamless .HelperPages.createRecord


!| script | StringSupport |
|note|store value from record created on case2|
|$hostRecordRecordType=|getValueFromVariable;|${fitnesseRecordTypeId}|
|$hostRecordRecordId=|getValueFromVariable;|$createdRecordId|


*!


!include -seamless .HelperPages.Data.makeFitnesseUserTestReadyWithCommonTestData

!***> Legacy test data '''training'''
!***> Creation of '''${trainingClassLeafletId}''' which is a record type used a foundation for validation type tests

!| RecordEndpointFixture |
|authToken      |type      |json             |testCreateRecord?|getStatusType?|
|$adminAuthToken|recordType|{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"${trainingClassLeafletId}"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"recordType"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseGroupId}"}],"name":"metadataId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}],"name":"presentationViewId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}],"name":"menuPresentationViewId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}],"name":"listPresentationViewId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}],"name":"autocompletePresentationView"},{"name":"public","value":"true"},{"name":"idSource","value":"timestamp"},{"name":"storeInArchive","value":"false"},{"repeatId":"0","name":"groupOfRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"usePermissionUnit","value":"false"},{"name":"useTrashBin","value":"false"},{"name":"useVisibility","value":"false"},{"name":"useHostRecordForPermissions","value":"false"}],"name":"recordType"}|  | CREATED |

*!

!***> Create validation type for personal training leaflets, called '''personalTrainingLeaflet'''. This refers to the record type above and uses the default metadata group which only contains one text variable. The validation type is intended for messaging for the message to the single participant invited to personal training.

!| RecordEndpointFixture |
|authToken      |type          |json        |testCreateRecord?|getStatusType?|
|$adminAuthToken|validationType|{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"${personalTrainingLeafletValidationId}"},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"validationType"}],"name":"validationType"}]},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}]},{"name":"newMetadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseNewGroupId}"}]},{"name":"metadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseGroupId}"}]},{"name":"newPresentationFormId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}]},{"name":"presentationFormId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}]},{"name":"validatesRecordType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${trainingClassLeafletId}"}]}]}|  | CREATED |

*!

!***> Create metadata group and validation type for '''circuitTrainingLeaflet'''. The idea with the leaflet is to inform each participant about the class and each other. We need a custom metadata group because the metadata for Circuit training requires at least 3 and max 10 participans rather than the default metadata group which only has 1 participant.

!| RecordEndpointFixture |
|authToken      |type          |json     |testCreateRecord?|getStatusType?|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata      |{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"${circuitTrainingLeafletNewGroupId}"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"circuitTrainingLeaflet"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"children":[{"repeatId":"4","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"exampleRecordInfoNewGroup"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"3"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"10"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseMetadataTextVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"1","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"10"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseMetadataNumberVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"2","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseCollectionVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"3","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseLinkId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"}],"name":"childReferences"},{"name":"excludePGroupCreation","value":"true"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"group"}}|  | CREATED |
|$adminAuthToken|metadata      |{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"${circuitTrainingLeafletGroupId}"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"circuitTrainingLeaflet"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"children":[{"repeatId":"4","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"exampleRecordInfoGroup"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"4"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"10"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseMetadataTextVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"1","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"10"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseMetadataNumberVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"2","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseCollectionVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"3","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseLinkId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"}],"name":"childReferences"},{"name":"excludePGroupCreation", "value":"true"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"group"}}     |  | CREATED |
|$adminAuthToken|validationType|{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"${circuitTrainingLeafletValidationId}"},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"validationType"}],"name":"validationType"}]},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}]},{"name":"newMetadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${circuitTrainingLeafletNewGroupId}"}]},{"name":"metadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${circuitTrainingLeafletGroupId}"}]},{"name":"newPresentationFormId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}]},{"name":"presentationFormId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}]},{"name":"validatesRecordType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${trainingClassLeafletId}"}]}]}|  | CREATED |

*!

!***> Create metadata group and validation type for '''bigCircuitTrainingLeaflet'''. This used to inform for bigger circuit training groups.
!| RecordEndpointFixture |
|authToken      |type          |json  |testCreateRecord?|getStatusType?|
|$adminAuthToken|metadata      |{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"${bigCircuitTrainingLeafletNewGroupId}"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"circuitTrainingLeaflet"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"children":[{"repeatId":"4","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"exampleRecordInfoNewGroup"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"12"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"20"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseMetadataTextVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"1","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"10"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseMetadataNumberVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"2","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseCollectionVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"3","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseLinkId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"}],"name":"childReferences"},{"name":"excludePGroupCreation","value":"true"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"group"}}|  | CREATED |
|$adminAuthToken|metadata      |{"children":[{"children":[{"name":"id","value":"${bigCircuitTrainingLeafletGroupId}"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}],"name":"dataDivider"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"metadataGroup"}],"name":"validationType"}],"name":"recordInfo"},{"name":"nameInData","value":"circuitTrainingLeaflet"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"textId"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}],"name":"defTextId"},{"children":[{"repeatId":"4","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"1"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"exampleRecordInfoGroup"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"0","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"13"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"20"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseMetadataTextVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"1","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"10"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseMetadataNumberVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"2","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseCollectionVarId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"},{"repeatId":"3","children":[{"name":"repeatMin","value":"0"},{"name":"repeatMax","value":"1"},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseLinkId}"}],"name":"ref"}],"name":"childReference"}],"name":"childReferences"},{"name":"excludePGroupCreation","value":"true"}],"name":"metadata","attributes":{"type":"group"}}      |  | CREATED |
|$adminAuthToken|validationType|{"name":"validationType","children":[{"name":"recordInfo","children":[{"name":"id","value":"${bigCircuitTrainingLeafletValidationId}"},{"name":"dataDivider","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"system"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"testSystem"}]},{"children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"validationType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"validationType"}],"name":"validationType"}]},{"name":"textId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}]},{"name":"defTextId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"text"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnesseTextId}"}]},{"name":"newMetadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${bigCircuitTrainingLeafletNewGroupId}"}]},{"name":"metadataId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"metadata"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${bigCircuitTrainingLeafletGroupId}"}]},{"name":"newPresentationFormId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}]},{"name":"presentationFormId","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"presentation"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${fitnessePGroupId}"}]},{"name":"validatesRecordType","children":[{"name":"linkedRecordType","value":"recordType"},{"name":"linkedRecordId","value":"${trainingClassLeafletId}"}]}]}          |  | CREATED |
*!
*!
